description: Perform a panel data analysis using the Grunfeld dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_data/grunfeld.csv. Create a Gretl script named 'panel_analysis.inp' in /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/ that sets the data structure to a panel (10 units, 20 periods) and estimates both Fixed Effects (Within) and Random Effects (GLS) models using 'invest' as the dependent variable and 'mvalue' and 'kstock' as regressors. Include a Hausman test to compare the models and save the complete analysis output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/panel_results.txt.
